title: Mossel Bay to host boxing championships for a second year
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - For the second time,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - For the second time, Mossel Bay will be hosting provincial championships for young boxers.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - For the second time, Mossel Bay will be hosting provincial championships for young boxers."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event, taking place at Barcelona Hall in KwaNonqaba in September, will feature talented young boxers from across the province, competing in two age categories: 12 to 14 years old, known as the cadets, and 15 to 16 years old, known as juniors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape gold medallist winners will represent the provincial team in the national games that will be held in the North West province from 7 to 12 October.","html":"The Western Cape gold medallist winners will represent the provincial team in the national games that will be held in the North West province from 7 to 12 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The national games coincide with the annual Mossel Bay Sports Festival, planned to take place from 5 September to 12 October this year.","html":"The national games coincide with the annual Mossel Bay Sports Festival, planned to take place from 5 September to 12 October this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Mossel Bay to host boxing championships for a second year
